mimic_improvements: Consolidated subqueries to single data scan
Window functions for efficient last value calculation
Extended itemid mappings for better coverage
Extended time windows (6h before to 48h after ICU admission)
Multiple data sources (lab events, chart events)
eicu_improvements: Multiple data sources (vitalperiodic, lab, nursecharting, respiratorycharting)
Extended time windows for better coverage
Better feature mapping to actual measurement names
Glasgow Coma Scale and nursing measurements

expected_performance_gains.eicu: 5-10x more data coverage from multiple tables
